energyValidation.name: EnergyCurveValidator
energyValidation.rule: Shorts mạnh đi theo LOW → MID → HIGH → RELEASE, không HIGH liên tục gây viewer fatigue.

cameraLanguage.name: CameraLanguageEngine
cameraLanguage.rule: Prefer wide → medium → close → macro → release wide. Never macro→macro→macro→macro.

runwayEscalation.name: RunwayEscalationEngine
runwayEscalation.rule: walk → turn/medium → close-up → detail → crowd → flash → hero pose → applause

rules: Every 2-3 seconds must reset attention via face, motion, light, crowd, or detail.
6-12s must escalate motion and runway rhythm.
Last beat must release emotional tension.

items.prompt:
VideoFlow Adapter Test
Concept: Luxury K-beauty fashion short with cinematic retention rhythm
Platform: youtube_shorts
Location: London Fashion Week
Main character: same female fashion model
Fashion DNA: luxury editorial runway, black outfit, cinematic spotlight

Shot 1: Pattern interrupt — LFW lights snap on
Phase: atmosphere
Description: Instant spotlight ignition over runway and crowd.
Camera: wide establishing
Lens: 24mm
Movement: fast push-in
Emotion beat: curiosity
Subject focus: runway lights

Rhythm node:
energy=9, intimacy=3, motion=8, tension=7, payoff=8, facePriority=2, socialProof=10

Cinematic instructions:
Create a fashion-show cinematic Shorts/Reels/TikTok-ready shot with motion continuity, micro-emotion, camera energy, visual tension escalation, and payoff cycling.
Preserve identity continuity, wardrobe continuity, hair/makeup continuity, luxury runway atmosphere, realistic skin and correct anatomy.
items.negativePrompt: identity drift, bad anatomy, deformed hands, random camera, static boring frame, plastic skin, wrong outfit continuity, crowd deformation, warped runway, low quality, watermark

Concept: Luxury K-beauty fashion short with cinematic retention rhythm
Platform: youtube_shorts
Location: London Fashion Week
Main character: same female fashion model
Fashion DNA: luxury editorial runway, black outfit, cinematic spotlight

Shot 1: Pattern interrupt — LFW lights snap on
Phase: atmosphere
Description: Instant spotlight ignition over runway and crowd.
Camera: wide establishing
Lens: 24mm
Movement: fast push-in
Emotion beat: curiosity
Subject focus: runway lights

Rhythm node:
energy=9, intimacy=3, motion=8, tension=7, payoff=8, facePriority=2, socialProof=10

Cinematic instructions:
Create a fashion-show cinematic Shorts/Reels/TikTok-ready shot with motion continuity, micro-emotion, camera energy, visual tension escalation, and payoff cycling.
Preserve identity continuity, wardrobe continuity, hair/makeup continuity, luxury runway atmosphere, realistic skin and correct anatomy.
items.negativePrompt: identity drift, bad anatomy, deformed hands, random camera, static boring frame, plastic skin, wrong outfit continuity, crowd deformation, warped runway, low quality, watermark
